pkgmetadata.longdescription: pyee.. image httpstravis-ci.orgjfhbrookpyee.png target httpstravis-ci.orgjfhbrookpyee.. image httpsreadthedocs.orgprojectspyeebadgeversionlatest target httpspyee.readthedocs.iopyee supplies a EventEmitter object that is similar to theEventEmitter class from Node.js. It also supplies a number of subclasseswith added support for async and threaded programming in python, such asasyncawait as seen in python 3.5+.Docs-----Autogenerated API docs, including basic installation directions and examples,can be found at httpspyee.readthedocs.io .Development------------See DEVELOPMENT.rst.Changelog----------See CHANGELOG.rst.Contributors-------------See CONTRIBUTORS.rst.License--------MITX11, see LICENSE.
